Edge Cases Test Page

Tests background images, lazy-loaded images, data URI images, and broken images.

Background Image (CSS)

Element with a female face set via CSS background-image. Should be hidden by the extension.

BG Image — Female Face
data-test="bg-image"

Lazy-Loaded Image

Image with data-src only (no src). After 2 seconds, JS copies data-src to src to simulate lazy loading. Should be hidden once loaded.

data-test="lazy" (loads after 2s)

Data URI Image

A small 2x2 red square encoded as a base64 PNG data URI. No face content — should remain visible.

data-test="data-uri" (safe — no face)

Broken Image

Image with src pointing to a URL that does not exist. Extension behavior depends on strict mode settings.

data-test="broken" (nonexistent URL)

Test Results

Checking... (results appear after 15 seconds)
